title: Ravager & Carpenter - Build with Villagers
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06043f2c2eefdfc00074f71053c059ee034062ed.png)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About
This mod adds a block called Framework, improving Raid and Village Life.

# Blocks

## Framework
![Frameworks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07474a31c8d0c98d7c7b7ecb6f0204c483ac43b3.png)
Frameworks are blocks that can be crafted using Iron Nuggets and Sticks.
The Framework also comes in a Broken Variant, which lacks the central diamond frame.

![Building](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aabe0ee8b963b7309958479936b433593d53392.png)
Using any block on a Framework allows you to put that block into a Framework.

If you use blocks on a Framework that already contains blocks, they will be stacked on top of each other like Scaffolding.

Also, if you hit Framework with Framework, you can break it down from the top down.

Framework will be transformed into the block you put it in by surrounding Villagers and Allays.

![Ravage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fb3542d17d7bb092a5f83f80d92bd593ee45c9d_0.webp)
When a Ravager joins a raid and crashes into a wall, it will turn the surrounding blocks into Broken Framework.
These will be repaired by Villagers once the raid is over.
